use_cases: Creating atmospheric volumetric light beams for hero sections and landing pages
Adding immersive 3D visual effects to portfolio or creative agency websites
Generating ambient background lighting for music or art-related projects
Enhancing visual depth with customizable light scattering and density effects
Adding film-style post-processing effects including grain, vignette, and exposure controls
ai_summary: A volumetric beams effect using React Three Fiber with custom GLSL shaders that creates angular light rays with configurable density, scattering, and striping patterns. Features mouse-influenced camera controls, auto-rotation, and post-processing effects including film grain, vignette, and gamma correction for a cinematic aesthetic.
